generated_oml:
instance DS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (range -55°C to 125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (range -55°C to 125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance DS18S20Sensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer (range -55°C to 125°C, accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to 85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionEnabler, RealTimeMonitoringEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 2 parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares via Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with 4 parameters calibrated using non-linear least squares via Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionEnabler
]

instance TemperaturePredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time monitoring of system safety and performance"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for state estimation using sensor data and model simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for fault detection through model-based simulations"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for transmitting sensor data to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance PythonScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares model calibration"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance OpenSourceCodeRepoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source code repository for digital twin development and maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, StateEstimationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers on PCB, requiring 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow controlled via Raspberry Pi GPIO through MOSFETs and optocouplers"
]

instance Container : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for managing sensors and actuators"
]

instance PCBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for power control of heatbed and fan"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains Container, Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20Sensor1, DS18S20Sensor2, DS18S20Sensor3, RaspberryPi4, PCBComponent, PowerSupply
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using calibrated models for improved accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoringInsight, MaintainTemperatureAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation using sensor data and model simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through model-based simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values used for decision-making"
]

instance SafetyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety status monitoring to prevent hazardous conditions"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated system state based on sensor data and model"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies or faults in the system"
]

instance MaintainTemperatureAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic control actions to maintain desired temperature within bounds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the controller (via RabbitMQ) to the low-level driver to actuate the heatbed and fan, with safe protocol enforced for device safety."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ communication server, low-level driver for hardware interaction, controller for logic execution, and simulation models; data flows via RabbitMQ between PT and DT components as shown in Figure 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, integrating real-time sensor data from the deployed physical system for continuous monitoring and prediction."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity validated through uniform temperature experiments and calibration against real data; residual error minimized using non-linear least squares; Assumption 1 (uniform temperature) tested via sensor placement experiments."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ (AMQP protocol) for communication between components; 1-Wire bus for sensor connections; MOSFETs and optocouplers for electrical isolation in control signals."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and all software components (controller, low-level driver) deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety, though specific cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety protocols are not detailed in the document."
]
